narrative.narrative: DXY weakness and gold strength are fueling a risk-off regime, reminiscent of the Luna crisis in May 2022, as investors seek safe havens. Despite BTC's recent gains, fear persists, driving traders to reduce leverage, signaling potential short-term volatility.
narrative.headline: Risk-Off Sentiment Drives BTC Volatility Amidst DXY Weakness
